hero.description: Start the day with the tools you use most, then check time, weather, and conversion helpers without leaving the homepage.

clock.title: Clock
clock.description: Live Kabul time with Gregorian, Hijri, and Jalali dates.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Switch months and keep today's date in view.

quick_links.description: Jump straight into your busiest modules.
